/usr/bin/clang++ -Xlinker --dependency-file=CMakeFiles/Luau.Bytecode.CLI.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/Luau.Bytecode.CLI.dir/CLI/src/Bytecode.cpp.o -o luau-bytecode  libLuau.Compiler.a libLuau.VM.a libLuau.CodeGen.a libLuau.CLI.lib.a -lpthread libLuau.Config.a libLuau.Compiler.a libLuau.VM.a libLuau.Ast.a libLuau.Common.a
